notes: Beach Body 2026 - PEAK WEEK. Overclocked parameters with progressive overload. Maintaining identical shoulder-safe angles (Floor Press & Landmine) but maximizing volume and density. Strict form required.

exercises.name: Push-up
exercises.notes: Peak volume. Focus on strict chest contraction. Stop 2 reps before shoulder fatigue.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: EXECUTE AS: Single-Arm Landmine Press. Safe plane overhead alternative.

exercises.name: Floor Press
exercises.notes: Dumbbell Floor Press. Mapped as BENCH_PRESS/DUMBBELL_FLOOR_PRESS. Floor blocks deep extension.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Mapped as SHOULDER_PRESS/DUMBBELL_SHOULDER_PRESS. Strictly 5kg for isolated burnout.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.notes: Controlled core finish.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: CRITICAL: 2-second forced pause at the bottom of every single rep.

exercises.name: Lunge
exercises.notes: Bulgarian split squats on bench. Slow eccentric phase.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: Peak conditioning volume. Explosive hip drive.

exercises.name: Hip Raise
exercises.notes: Glute bridge with resistance band. 2-second peak contraction at the top.

exercises.name: Pull-up
exercises.notes: Chin-up underhand grip mapping. Focus on lat and bicep recruitment.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Retaining the heavy 35kg load. Drive down with the elbows.

exercises.name: Row
exercises.notes: Seated cable rows. Strict upright posture.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Mapped as ROW/FACE_PULL. High volume prehab to flush left shoulder with blood.

exercises.name: Curl
exercises.notes: SUPERSET BLOCK: Mapped as PULL_UP/CHIN_UP for tracking. Transition immediately to Triceps Extension with zero rest.

exercises.name: Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: SUPERSET PART 2: Banded Tricep Extension. Rest 60s only after this step is completed.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: T-bar landmine conditioning press.

exercises.name: Renegade Row
exercises.notes: Solid core plank rigidity.

exercises.name: Lunge
exercises.notes: High-volume kettlebell step-ups.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Floor to Shelf
exercises.notes: Mapped as HIP_SWING/SINGLE_ARM_KETTLEBELL_SWING to prevent stripping.

exercises.name: Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Final core burn.
